LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_WorkMode.label: work mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_WorkMode.description: Autobroadcaster is playing energetic music that makes everyone work a little bit harder.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_WorkMode_Buff.label: work mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_WorkMode_Buff.descriptio: Autobroadcaster is playing energetic music that makes everyone work a little bit harder.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Relax.label: relax mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Relax.description: Autobroadcaster is playing soothing music that makes everyone a little bit more relaxed.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Relax_Buff.label: relax mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Relax_Buff.description: Autobroadcaster is playing soothing music that makes everyone a little bit more relaxed.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Recruitment.label: recruitment mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Recruitment.description: Autobroadcaster is playing propaganda messages aimed at prisoners with the purpose of lowering their resistance.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Recruitment_Buff.label: recruitment mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Recruitment_Buff.descrip: Autobroadcaster is playing propaganda messages aimed at prisoners with the purpose of lowering their resistance.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Conversion.label: conversion mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Conversion.description: Autobroadcaster is playing ideological rhetoric aimed at prisoners with the purpose of converting their beliefs.
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Conversion_Buff.label: conversion mode
LanguageData.VQE_Broadcaster_Conversion_Buff.descript: Autobroadcaster is playing ideological rhetoric aimed at prisoners with the purpose of converting their beliefs.
